scripts.build: bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/dillion-darwin-arm64 --target=bun-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/dillion-darwin-x64 --target=bun-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/dillion-linux-x64 --target=bun-linux-x64 && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/dillion-linux-arm64 --target=bun-linux-arm64
scripts.release: bun run build && gh release create v$npm_package_version dist/dillion-darwin-arm64 dist/dillion-darwin-x64 dist/dillion-linux-x64 dist/dillion-linux-arm64 --title v$npm_package_version --generate-notes
